programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: After a rough Santa Ana start, buyers head to Hawaiian Gardens. Ivy pushes through illness, Darrell and Brandon target Dave's turf, Mary sticks to her budget, and new rivals shake things up.

programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: Being hampered by the weather and Eric's stubbornness to throw away new items, the hoarders crew is pushed to their limits.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: The trip to Rome may be coming to an end, but the conflict continues. While a Vespa ride reminds Kyle and Dorit just how much fun they can have together, Denise calls out Lisa for betraying her.

programs.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programs.desc: A new stew sparks mixed reactions, a deckhand reels from bad news, and Aesha hits her limit when the laundry room is still a mess.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 49-year-old Nasly has been brought into St George's by ambulance after suffering a rare complication of diabetes. Charlie has been bought into A&E with crippling chest and back pain.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
programs.desc: Charley says he loaned his friend, Michael, some money after his company fell on hard times. But Michael hasn't paid him back, so Charley is here to collect what he is owed.
